description: Exercise crashes and partial failures between provider response, run persistence, candidate creation, evidence write, finding projection, review feedback, and promotion. Cover Oban retry, abandoned-running recovery, duplicate delivery, timeout, malformed payload, and database rollback boundaries. Acceptance: every case has a documented idempotency key and proves either complete recovery or an operator-visible terminal state with no duplicate business records.
title: Add retry idempotency and failure injection suite
